objects.name: Ollama Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability Allows Remote Process Memory Leak
objects.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a critical security vulnerability in Ollama that, if successfully exploited, could allow a remote, unauthenticated attacker to leak its entire process memory. The out-of-bounds read flaw, which likely impacts over 300,000 servers globally, is tracked as CVE-2026-7482 (CVSS score: 9.1). It has been codenamed Bleeding Llama by Cyera.

external_references.description: Ollama Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability Allows Remote Process Memory Leak
